calendar.matters:
Petition To Change Name
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Amy Elizabeth Burch was present in pro per
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Amy Elizabeth Fry.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

This case was added to the calendar: ok per the court manager and per the Court. Clets that was ran for the 6-19-12 court date used for this hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Reset To Jun-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
